EU2.name: Europe - Part 2
EU2.coverage: Eastern Europe, Scandinavia, Caucasus, and European Russia including Greece, Bulgaria, Romania, Moldova, Ukraine, Belarus, Baltic States, Finland, Sweden, Norway, Turkey, Cyprus, Georgia, Armenia, Azerbaijan, and European Russia extending to the Ural Mountains

OC.name: Oceania
OC.coverage: Australia, New Zealand, Fiji, French Polynesia, Papua New Guinea, Vanuatu, Solomon Islands

AS2.name: Asia - Part 2
AS2.coverage: Middle East, South Asia, and Central Asia including Saudi Arabia, UAE, Oman, Yemen, Iran, Iraq, Syria, Jordan, Israel, Lebanon, eastern Turkey, Afghanistan, Pakistan, India, Nepal, Bhutan, Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, Maldives, Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan, Turkmenistan, Kyrgyzstan, Tajikistan, western China, western Mongolia, southern Russia, and Indian Ocean islands

AS3.name: Asia - Part 3
AS3.coverage: Indonesia, Malaysia, Philippines, Vietnam, Thailand, Japan, South Korea, Taiwan, Eastern Russia

AS4.name: Asia - Part 4
AS4.coverage: Russia east of the Ural Mountains extending to the Pacific peninsula

AF2.name: Africa - Part 2
AF2.coverage: Southern Africa including South Africa, Namibia, Botswana, Zimbabwe, Zambia, Mozambique, Madagascar, Tanzania, Kenya, DRC

AF1.name: Africa - Part 1
AF1.coverage: North Africa including Morocco, Algeria, Tunisia, Libya, Egypt, Sudan, South Sudan, Ethiopia, Somalia, Djibouti, Chad, Niger, Nigeria, Cameroon, Central African Republic, Mali, Senegal, Gambia, Guinea, Sierra Leone, Liberia, Ivory Coast, Ghana, Benin, Mauritania, Western Sahara
